response.title: Senior Healthcare Analytics Manager
response.description: We are seeking a Senior Healthcare Analytics Manager to lead our analytics team in transforming data into actionable insights that drive clinical and operational efficiencies. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience in healthcare analytics, a strong understanding of healthcare data governance, and the ability to collaborate with clinical and operational teams to improve patient outcomes.

required_skills: Proficiency in SQL for data manipulation and analysis
Hands-on experience with data visualization tools such as Tableau or Power BI
Knowledge of statistical analysis and predictive modeling techniques
Experience with Electronic Health Record (EHR) systems and data integration
Strong understanding of healthcare regulations (HIPAA, HITECH)
Ability to communicate complex data insights to non-technical stakeholders
Expertise in data quality assessment and data governance practices
Experience in leading and mentoring analytics teams
preferred_skills: Familiarity with machine learning algorithms and tools
Certifications in healthcare analytics (e.g., CAHIMS, CPHIMS)
requirements.education: Master's degree in Healthcare Administration, Public Health, or a related field
